query:
SELECT 
  i.period_no, i.due_date, i.amount, i.paid_amount, i.principal, i.interest, i.fee
FROM installments i
WHERE i.contract_external_id = '10008' AND i.section = 'Fastfone365'
ORDER BY i.period_no;
